hibernate-mapping.query: Select employeeBankAccount from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EmployeeBankAccount as employeeBankAccount where employeeBankAccount.Employee.Company=:company and employeeBankAccount.Employee.SourceEmployeeId=:srcEmployeeId and (employeeBankAccount.SourceBankAccountId=:sourceBankAccountId or :sourceBankAccountId is null) order by employeeBankAccount.StatusEffectiveDate, employeeBankAccount.Version
hibernate-mapping.sql-query: SELECT /*+ index(employeeba2_ PSP_EMPLOYEE_BANK_ACCOUNT_FK2) index(bankaccoun3_ SYS_C008577) */ employeeba2_.employee_fk, bankaccoun3_.routing_number, bankaccoun3_.account_number_enc, bankaccoun3_.account_type_cd FROM psp_on_hold_reason onholdreas0_ INNER JOIN psp_employee employee1_ ON employee1_.company_fk = onholdreas0_.company_fk INNER JOIN psp_employee_bank_account employeeba2_ ON employee1_.employee_seq = employeeba2_.employee_fk INNER JOIN psp_bank_account bankaccoun3_ ON employeeba2_.bank_account_fk = bankaccoun3_.bank_account_seq WHERE (onholdreas0_.on_hold_reason_cd IN ('Fraud', 'FraudReview')) AND (onholdreas0_.expiration_date IS NULL)

SELECT /*+ USE_NL (onholdreas0_, payee) USE_NL (payee, pba) */ pba.payee_fk, bankaccoun3_.routing_number, bankaccoun3_.account_number_enc, bankaccoun3_.account_type_cd FROM psp_on_hold_reason onholdreas0_ INNER JOIN psp_payee payee ON payee.company_fk = onholdreas0_.company_fk INNER JOIN psp_payee_bank_account pba ON payee.payee_seq = pba.payee_fk INNER JOIN psp_bank_account bankaccoun3_ ON pba.bank_account_fk = bankaccoun3_.bank_account_seq WHERE (onholdreas0_.on_hold_reason_cd IN ('Fraud', 'FraudReview')) AND (onholdreas0_.expiration_date IS NULL)
